tabs.content:
.alter table ActivityRuns_Failed_tbl policy update
```[{
    "IsEnabled": true,
    "Source": "ActivityRuns_tbl",
    "Query": "NormalizeActivityRuns() | where status == \"Failed\"",
    "IsTransactional": false,
    "PropagateIngestionProperties": true
}]```





.create-or-alter function with (folder = "normalize", docstring = "Normalize ActivityRuns_tbl: expand ArrayValue_records", skipvalidation = "true") NormalizeActivityRuns() {
    ActivityRuns_tbl
| extend _records = iif(
    isnull(array_length(ArrayValue_records)),
    pack_array(ArrayValue_records),
    ArrayValue_records
)
| mv-expand rec = _records
| where isnotnull(rec)
| extend p = todynamic(rec["properties"])
| extend activityIterationCount = toint(rec['activityIterationCount']),
        activityName = tostring(rec['activityName']),                
        activityRetryCount = toint(rec['activityRetryCount']),
        activityRunId = tostring(rec['activityRunId']),
        activityType = tostring(rec['activityType']),
        billingResourceId = tostring(rec['billingResourceId']),
        body = tostring(rec['body']),
        correlationId = tostring(rec['correlationId']),
        level = tostring(rec['level']),
        location = tostring(rec['location']),
        name = tostring(rec['name']),
        operationName = tostring(rec['operationName']),
        pipelineName = tostring(rec['pipelineName']),
        pipelineRunId = tostring(rec['pipelineRunId']),
        recoveryStatus = tostring(rec['recoveryStatus']),
        resourceId = tostring(rec['resourceId']),
        severityNumber = toint(rec['severityNumber']),
        severityText = tostring(rec['severityText']),
        start = tostring(rec['start']),
        status = tostring(rec['status']),
        tags = todynamic(rec['tags']),
        timestamp = tostring(rec['timestamp']),
        run_time = tostring(rec['time']),
        source = todynamic(p.Input.source),
        sink = todynamic(p.Input.sink),
        error = todynamic(p.Error),
        errorCode = tostring(p.Error.errorCode),
        errorMessage = tostring(p.Error.message),
        errorFailureType = tostring(p.Error.failureType),
        errorTarget = tostring(p.Error.target),
        eventProcessedUtcTime = todatetime(EventProcessedUtcTime),
        eventEnqueuedUtcTime = todatetime(EventEnqueuedUtcTime),
        ingestion_time = todatetime(rec['ingestion_time'])
| project activityIterationCount, activityName, activityRetryCount, activityRunId, activityType, billingResourceId,
        body, correlationId, level, location, name, operationName, pipelineName, pipelineRunId, recoveryStatus,
        resourceId, severityNumber, severityText, start, status, tags, timestamp, run_time, source, sink, error,
        errorCode, errorMessage, errorFailureType, errorTarget, eventProcessedUtcTime, eventEnqueuedUtcTime, ingestion_time
}





.set-or-append ActivityRuns_Failed_tbl <|
NormalizeActivityRuns()
| where status == "Failed"

// Create the table with column types that match the NormalizeActivityRuns() projection
.create table ActivityRuns_Failed_tbl (
    activityIterationCount:int,
    activityName:string,
    activityRetryCount:int,
    activityRunId:string,
    activityType:string,
    billingResourceId:string,
    body:string,
    correlationId:string,
    level:string,
    location:string,
    name:string,
    operationName:string,
    pipelineName:string,
    pipelineRunId:string,
    recoveryStatus:string,
    resourceId:string,
    severityNumber:int,
    severityText:string,
    start:string,
    status:string,
    tags:dynamic,
    timestamp:string,
    run_time:string,
    source:dynamic,
    sink:dynamic,
    error:dynamic,
    errorCode:string,
    errorMessage:string,
    errorFailureType:string,
    errorTarget:string,
    eventProcessedUtcTime:datetime,
    eventEnqueuedUtcTime:datetime,
    ingestion_time:datetime
)
